The '''Mount Corvast Citadel''' was the center of operations for the energy [[Miner/Legends|miners]] of [[Sarapin/Legends|Sarapin]]. It was located in Sarapin's [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]], [[Mount Corvast]].
